settings.title: Contact TGPCOP NOTES
settings.subtitle: We’re here to help B.Pharmacy & D.Pharmacy students with premium handwritten notes, GPAT resources and instant PDF support.

settings.title: Need Instant Help?
settings.description: Get quick responses for notes access, semester bundles, GPAT resources and PDF download support.

settings.title: Student Help Center
settings.subtitle: Common questions about our digital notes and student support.

settings.question: How will I receive notes?
settings.answer: You will receive an instant download link on the checkout page and via email immediately after successful payment. All notes are in high-quality PDF format.

settings.question: Are notes handwritten?
settings.answer: Yes, all our B.Pharm and D.Pharm notes are premium handwritten materials, meticulously curated by top subject experts for maximum clarity.

settings.question: Is it useful for exams?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Our notes are specifically designed as exam-focused summaries, following the PCI syllabus to help you score high with less effort.

settings.question: Do you provide GPAT material?
settings.answer: Yes, we have a dedicated section for GPAT resources, including high-yield summaries and previous year question banks.

settings.question: How fast is delivery?
settings.answer: Delivery is 100% instant. No waiting. Once your payment is confirmed, the PDF is yours to download immediately.
